posts.author: Molina (Irene)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I have a board with a file column where several Google documents are posted.

This column is reflected in another dashboard shared with 400 suppliers. Depending on the type of supplier, a document is reflected.

The idea is that the supplier uses the reflected document to complete and sign it.

But from what we are checking, the providers cannot see the reflected columns.

Is there an option for them to view them and download the attached file?

By the way, yesterday I was at your event in Madrid and I really liked it.
